description_long: This object is a compact, futuristic shotgun with a predominantly red and black color scheme, featuring a weathered and scratched metal exterior. The main body is rectangular with rounded edges, and the surface shows signs of wear, exposing metallic silver beneath the paint. The shotgun has a double-barrel configuration, with two cylindrical barrels stacked vertically at the front. The grip is angular and black, designed for a single hand, and there is a visible trigger area with a squared-off trigger guard. The overall design is utilitarian, with exposed bolts and panel lines, suggesting a rugged, industrial build suitable for urban environments.
description: A compact, red and black double-barrel shotgun with a weathered metal finish, angular grip, and industrial design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the two vertically stacked barrels and the narrow sight channel along the top.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the red and black body, exposed metal wear, and the angular black grip.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the grip, the sight channel, and the squared-off trigger guard.
description_view_3: Right side view showing similar wear patterns, the double-barrel end, and the grip's angular design.
attribute_barrel_configuration: over-under double-barrel, vertically stacked with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: squared, medium-sized trigger guard with straight edges and no finger grooves
